title: libanotis iliensis
intro: Libanotis iliensis, also known as Illicium verum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Schisandraceae. It is a type of shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of the Tian Shan mountain range in Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Libanotis iliensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
